news.title:
Granules India, Aurobindo Pharma, and Wheels India emerge as top picks with bullish setups.
Analyst recommends buying Granules at ₹629, Wheels at ₹1,090, and Aurobindo at ₹1,308 with specific targets.
news.summary:
Granules India, Aurobindo Pharma, and Wheels India emerge as top picks with bullish setups.
Analyst recommends buying Granules at ₹629, Wheels at ₹1,090, and Aurobindo at ₹1,308 with specific targets.

news.title:
Aurobindo Pharma's CuraTeQ partners with STADA to market EMA-approved biosimilars in select EU nations.
The agreement covers major markets like France and Germany with new brand names for each biosimilar.
news.summary:
Aurobindo Pharma's CuraTeQ partners with STADA to market EMA-approved biosimilars in select EU nations.
The agreement covers major markets like France and Germany with new brand names for each biosimilar.

news.title:
Aurobindo Pharma surged 3%, hitting a 52-week high of ₹1,321.3 on BSE.
JM Financial sees upside, maintaining BUY rating with target price ₹1,610.
news.summary:
Aurobindo Pharma surged 3%, hitting a 52-week high of ₹1,321.3 on BSE.
JM Financial sees upside, maintaining BUY rating with target price ₹1,610.

news.title:
UBS highlights intense competition in generic GLP-1, impacting pharma stocks.
UBS rates Sun Pharma 'Buy', Cipla & Aurobindo 'Neutral', Dr Reddy’s, Lupin, Zydus 'Sell'.
news.summary:
UBS highlights intense competition in generic GLP-1, impacting pharma stocks.
UBS rates Sun Pharma 'Buy', Cipla & Aurobindo 'Neutral', Dr Reddy’s, Lupin, Zydus 'Sell'.

news.title:
Aurobindo Pharma's Apitoria unit received USFDA's VAI classification for its Telangana API facility.
Aurobindo Pharma's Q3FY25 net profit rose 7.5% YoY to ₹909.8 crore; shares gained 2.1% to ₹1,274.
news.summary:
Aurobindo Pharma's Apitoria unit received USFDA's VAI classification for its Telangana API facility.
Aurobindo Pharma's Q3FY25 net profit rose 7.5% YoY to ₹909.8 crore; shares gained 2.1% to ₹1,274.

news.title:
Aurobindo Pharma's Unit-V of Apitoria Pharma labeled VAI by USFDA post inspection.
Inspection from Dec 1-12, 2025, led to Form 483 issuance with three observations.
news.summary:
Aurobindo Pharma's Unit-V of Apitoria Pharma labeled VAI by USFDA post inspection.
Inspection from Dec 1-12, 2025, led to Form 483 issuance with three observations.

news.title: US FDA classifies Eugia Pharma Unit II of Aurobindo Pharma as 'Official Action Indicated'.
news.summary: US FDA classifies Eugia Pharma Unit II of Aurobindo Pharma as 'Official Action Indicated'.

news.title:
US FDA inspected Aurobindo Pharma's Unit II, raising 9 Form 483 observations.
Unit II classified as OAI; company expects no impact on business operations.
news.summary:
US FDA inspected Aurobindo Pharma's Unit II, raising 9 Form 483 observations.
Unit II classified as OAI; company expects no impact on business operations.

news.title:
Aurobindo Pharma faces Rs. 77.61 crore GST demand and penalty; interest waived.
Partial relief granted; company to appeal at GST Appellate Tribunal.
news.summary:
Aurobindo Pharma faces Rs. 77.61 crore GST demand and penalty; interest waived.
Partial relief granted; company to appeal at GST Appellate Tribunal.

news.title:
Aurobindo Pharma's Andhra plant gets VAI classification from USFDA.
VAI indicates objectionable practices found but no regulatory action needed.
news.summary:
Aurobindo Pharma's Andhra plant gets VAI classification from USFDA.
VAI indicates objectionable practices found but no regulatory action needed.

news.title:
APL Healthcare's Unit-IV, owned by Aurobindo Pharma, inspected by US FDA, classified as VAI.
Inspection closed post Form 483 with 5 observations; facility received EIR confirming VAI status.
news.summary:
APL Healthcare's Unit-IV, owned by Aurobindo Pharma, inspected by US FDA, classified as VAI.
Inspection closed post Form 483 with 5 observations; facility received EIR confirming VAI status.

news.title:
Aurobindo Pharma's unit launched Pomalidomide Capsules in US, a generic of BMS's Pomalyst.
Capsules available in 1-4 mg doses; US drug market size approx. $3.3B.
news.summary:
Aurobindo Pharma's unit launched Pomalidomide Capsules in US, a generic of BMS's Pomalyst.
Capsules available in 1-4 mg doses; US drug market size approx. $3.3B.

news.title:
Geopolitical tensions impact Indian markets; Nifty, Sensex expected to open lower as crude prices surge.
Stocks in focus: Adani Ports, ONGC, BEL, Airtel, Tata Motors, Aurobindo Pharma, SpiceJet, Vishal Mega Mart.
news.summary:
Geopolitical tensions impact Indian markets; Nifty, Sensex expected to open lower as crude prices surge.
Stocks in focus: Adani Ports, ONGC, BEL, Airtel, Tata Motors, Aurobindo Pharma, SpiceJet, Vishal Mega Mart.

news.title:
US FDA inspects Eugia Pharma Specialties' Unit I with 4 observations.
Aurobindo Pharma's subsidiary faced these observations post-inspection.
news.summary:
US FDA inspects Eugia Pharma Specialties' Unit I with 4 observations.
Aurobindo Pharma's subsidiary faced these observations post-inspection.

news.title:
Eugia Pharma, Aurobindo's unit, gets USFDA nod for Everolimus tablets.
Launch planned in Q1 FY27; market size projected at $78M.
news.summary:
Eugia Pharma, Aurobindo's unit, gets USFDA nod for Everolimus tablets.
Launch planned in Q1 FY27; market size projected at $78M.

news.title:
Aurobindo Pharma revives Penicillin G production in India, targeting 15,000 MT capacity, challenging China's dominance with govt PLI support.
Integrated operations utilize 3,000 MT internally; 6,000 MT slated for export, leveraging domestic fermentation expertise to stabilize supply.
news.summary:
Aurobindo Pharma revives Penicillin G production in India, targeting 15,000 MT capacity, challenging China's dominance with govt PLI support.
Integrated operations utilize 3,000 MT internally; 6,000 MT slated for export, leveraging domestic fermentation expertise to stabilize supply.

news.title:
Aurobindo Pharma saw a block trade of 883,262 shares at Rs. 1211.5.
The total value of the trade amounted to Rs. 107.01 crores.
news.summary:
Aurobindo Pharma saw a block trade of 883,262 shares at Rs. 1211.5.
The total value of the trade amounted to Rs. 107.01 crores.

news.title: Aurobindo Pharma Ltd forms Engenra Biologics Pvt Ltd to boost contract and pharma manufacturing.
news.summary: Aurobindo Pharma Ltd forms Engenra Biologics Pvt Ltd to boost contract and pharma manufacturing.

news.title:
GST authority demands Rs. 170 Cr refund from Aurobindo Pharma for Sept-Dec 2022 exports under LUT.
Dispute involves ITC refund on zero-rated supplies; company contests, claims no material financial impact.
news.summary:
GST authority demands Rs. 170 Cr refund from Aurobindo Pharma for Sept-Dec 2022 exports under LUT.
Dispute involves ITC refund on zero-rated supplies; company contests, claims no material financial impact.

news.title:
Aurobindo Pharma asked to repay ₹169.8 crore by GST Dept for alleged wrong refunds.
The company will appeal the decision, stating no significant financial impact.
news.summary:
Aurobindo Pharma asked to repay ₹169.8 crore by GST Dept for alleged wrong refunds.
The company will appeal the decision, stating no significant financial impact.
